NTC OF NON-OPPOS. TO MINOR'S MTN TO RELIEVE JOSE BARCELO AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION, 301, RULING - ATTY. FISCHER INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE BIOLOGICAL FATHER JOSE BARCELO'S PARENTAL RIGHTS HAVE BEEN TERMINATED BY THE JUVENILLE DEPENDENCY COURT. SHE ALSO ADVISED ATTY. KRONER (PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL) THAT SHE WILL BE APPEARING IN COURT AND THAT HE HAS NO OBJECTION THAT THE ADOPTIVE PARENTS BE APPOINTED AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM. NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE FATHER AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING RULING: PLAINTIFF A.B'S MOTION TO RELIEVE JOSE BARCELO AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF REFILING MOTION AND GIVING NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES INCLUDING THE FATHER JOSE BARCELO. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR# 8189 301/PJB

Notice Of Motion To Relieve Jose Barcelo As Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Jan-28-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. AMANDA M. FISHCER, TEL. NO. 359-4856 APPEARING FOR THE MOVING PARTY;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - ATTY. FISCHER INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE BIOLOGICAL FATHER JOSE BARCELO'S PARENTAL RIGHTS HAVE BEEN TERMINATED BY THE JUVENILLE DEPENDENCY COURT. SHE ALSO ADVISED ATTY. KRONER (PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL) THAT SHE WILL BE APPEARING IN COURT AND THAT HE HAS NO OBJECTION THAT THE ADOPTIVE PARENTS BE APPOINTED AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM. NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE FATHER AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT MADE THE FOLLOWING RULING: PLAINTIFF A.B.'S Motion To Relieve Jose Barcelo As Guardian Ad Litem IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF REFILING MOTION AND GIVING NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES INCLUDING THE FATHER JOSE BARCELO. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB

MINI MINUTES:

ALMA JACKSON, CEO OF SOJOURNER TRUTH FFA, DEFENDANT;
ATTY. DANIEL A. ZAHEER, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WERE MADE. ATTY. GEORGE HOLLAND'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS DEFENDANT SOJOURNER TRUTH F F A 'S Counsel IS GRANTED. BASED ON THE REPRESENTATION OF MS. JACKSON, SHE IS NOT OPPOSING THE WITHDRAWAL OF COUNSEL FROM THE CASE. THE COURT MADE IT CLEAR THAT SINCE IT IS A CORPORATION, SHE NEEDS TO HIRE A NEW COUNSEL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189
